content_synchronization.description: Sync content updates between thematic worlds
content_synchronization.use_case: Edge Garden ↔ Persistence Garden secret sharing
content_synchronization.python_implementation:
def sync_content_update(content_data):
    import json, time
    message = {
        'type': 'content_update',
        'source_world': 'Edge Garden',
        'content_type': 'secret',
        'content_id': content_data['id'],
        'content_data': content_data,
        'timestamp': time.time(),
        'sync_direction': 'bidirectional'
    }
    # Send via WebSocket
    ws.send(json.dumps(message))

visitor_journey_coordination.description: Coordinate visitor paths across multiple worlds
visitor_journey_coordination.use_case: Signal Cartographer ↔ Canonical Observatory route planning
visitor_journey_coordination.python_implementation:
def coordinate_visitor_journey(visitor_data):
    import json, time
    message = {
        'type': 'visitor_journey',
        'visitor_id': visitor_data['id'],
        'current_world': 'Signal Cartographer',
        'current_location': 'Bridge Exchange #1',
        'destination_world': 'Canonical Observatory',
        'destination_target': 'Navigation Compass',
        'journey_sequence': [
            'Signal Cartographer → Bridge Exchange',
            'Cross-world transit',
            'Canonical Observatory arrival',
            'Navigation Compass access'
        ],
        'timestamp': time.time(),
        'priority': 'high'
    }
    # Send via WebSocket
    ws.send(json.dumps(message))

growth_analytics_sharing.use_case: Automation Observatory → All worlds analytics distribution
growth_analytics_sharing.python_implementation:
def broadcast_growth_analytics(analytics_data):
    import json, time
    message = {
        'type': 'growth_analytics',
        'source_world': 'Automation Observatory',
        'analytics_type': 'metrics',
        'data': analytics_data,
        'timestamp': time.time(),
        'time_range': 'hourly',
        'confidence': 'high',
        'broadcast': True
    }
    # Broadcast via WebSocket
    ws.send(json.dumps(message))
